meaning: adj.多汁的,潮湿的,有趣的,报酬多的
examples: She bit into a ripe juicy pear.
The meat was tender and juicy.
It provided some juicy gossip for a few days.
When roasted, the skin becomes crispy on the outside and juicy on the inside.
Start with the spicy fried soft shell crab and juicy morsels of grilled beef wrapped in betel leaves.
